zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory於1218年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 馬根時，他的父親Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy39歲，母親Margaret de Lanherne30歲。他和Eva Roche至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他於1260年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1275年10月23日享年57歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory于1218年出生在英国可瓦爾聖 馬根时，他的父亲Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy39岁，母亲Margaret de Lanherne30岁。他和Eva Roche至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他于1260年在英国英格兰可瓦爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1275年10月23日享年57岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾藍黑爾。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory was born in 1218, in St Mawgan, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy, was 39 and his mother, Margaret de Lanherne, was 30. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Eva Roche. In 1260, at the age of 42, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. He died on 23 October 1275, at the age of 57, and was buried in Lanherne, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory est né en 1218, à St Mawgan, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Lanherne, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Eva Roche. En 1260, à l’âge de 42 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 23 octobre 1275, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.St Germans, Cornwall, England: St Germans, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory 1218 in St Mawgan, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy 39 und seine Mutter Margaret de Lanherne 30. Er hatte mit Eva Roche mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1260, als er 42 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Oktober 1275 im Alter von 57 Jahren und wurde in Lanherne, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.St Germans, Cornwall, England: St Germans, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory è nato il nel 1218 nel St Mawgan, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Lanherne, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Eva Roche. Nel 1260, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 23 ottobre 1275, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Lanherne, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Treloryが1218年にイギリスコルンワルスト マウガンで生まれた時，父Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloyは39歳，母Margaret de Lanherneは30歳であった。彼はEva Rocheとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1260年，42歳の時，イギリスイギリスコルンワルでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1275年10月23日に57歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルランハーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory(이)가 1218년 영국 코른월 스트 마w건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Lanherne(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Eva Roche(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1260년, 42세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1275년 10월 23일 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 랜헤른에 묻혔다.

pt.St Germans, Cornwall, England: St Germans, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory nasceu em 1218, em St Mawgan, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Lanherne, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Eva Roche. Em 1260, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1275, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ro.St Germans, Cornwall, England: St Germans, Cornwall, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory родился в 1218 г. в местности ст мавган, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Lanherne, 30. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Eva Roche. В 1260 году, в возрасте 42 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 23 октября 1275 г. в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory nació en 1218, en St Mawgan, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret de Lanherne, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Eva Roche. En 1260, a la edad de 42 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1275, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
